items.name: Fall Periastron Xi
items.description: The sword men use to fight mutated attack turkeys... in space.

items.name: Seranok's Golden Chalice of Fame
items.description: Hold this chalice while it oozes fame all around you spawning pawns as you go.

items.name: Sorcus' Chair
items.description: This is how he rolls...and trolls....  Sorcus' Chair came out of the Surly Gift of Sorcus II on October 26th, 2012.

items.name: Alpaca Mount
items.description: Alpaca your bags, you're ready to ride! Equip to spawn in front of you and simply hop on. Walks at a normal pace; however can jump super high.

items.name: Classic Bucket
items.description: I has a bucket.  Nooo they be stealin' my Bucket.  This gear item is awesome for playing tag.

items.name: Forbidden Box
items.description: You know that box your gramps told you never to open?  Now you know why!  The Forbidden Box will summon several violent beasts, which will hunt down any player, friend or foe, who lays eyes on it or falls within its area of effect. You can spawn up to four monsters at a time, each of which is capable of dealing 10 points of damage per second.

items.name: Gear Cloner
items.description: This device will clone your gear so that you can share it with a teammate or friend.

items.name: Fang Of Anansi
items.description: "The surest poison is time"... but the second surest poison is contained in the spiders unleashed by this powerful sword. Slash and stab with the blade, or summon spiders to defeat your foe for you.

items.name: Red Balloon
items.description:
Hast Du etwas Zeit für mich /
Dann singe ich ein Lied fuer Dich /
Von 99 Luftballons /
Auf ihrem Weg zum Horizont /
Denkst Du vielleicht grad' an mich /
Dann singe ich ein Lied fuer Dich /
Von 99 Luftballons /
Und dass sowas von sowas kommt

items.name: Iris Katana of Goldengrove Unleaving
items.description: "Nor mouth had / no nor mind expressed / what heart heard of / ghost guessed"

items.name: Rainbow Omega Katana
items.description: Slash and lunge at your foes with this amazing katana to do 12 to 16 points of damage.  The power of Rainbow surrounds this Katana.

items.name: Ice Staff
items.description: Click on a location within 64 studs of your character to create a large wall of ice. The ice is slippery and nigh impossible to climb. Use it to block off corridors and routes of escape!

items.name: Giant Blade
items.description: This giant blade is extremely powerful and does 45 damage. The blade's weight will slow you down slightly, but  when you're doing this much damage - it's hard to notice.

items.name: TheGamer101's ROBLOX Tablet
items.description: Winner: TheGamer101. ROBLOX will be in touch to redeem this prize. Void if sold, traded, or deleted.

items.name: mygame43's ROBLOX Tablet
items.description: Winner: mygame43. ROBLOX will be in touch to redeem this prize. Void if sold, traded, or deleted.

items.name: Astral Cloak of Transportation
items.description: All magical secrets are held by the Wizards of the Astral Isles, but they don't mind lending out this cloak.  Just don't ask how it gets you from A to B.

items.name: Shadow Sword
items.description: Equipping the Shadow Sword shrouds your character in darkness. You immediately transform into a warrior wearing a jet-black suit and begin emitting a cloud of dark fog. While your appearance unnerves and disorients your opponents, each sword strike does 35 points of damage and pressing space twice teleports you forward.

items.name: Black Hole Sword
items.description: Slash your foes into a despair so dark that even light cannot escape it.

items.name: HEX Spitter
items.description: A genuine Hex style laser blaster- shoot lightning lasers at lightning fast rates.

items.name: Colossal Blade
items.description: What's done, cannot be undone.

items.name: Grim Axe
items.description: Beheads your enemies and causes them to walk around headless.  Don't stand too close to the head after the fact, it would be an EXPLOSIVE mistake!

items.name: Moonwalk Dance Potion
items.description: We are here to change the world!

items.name: Rail Runner 5000
items.description: When you absolutely must put a rail through somebody.

items.name: Venomshank
items.description: Because doesn't he deserve the most painful bloxxing possible?

items.name: Spec Gamma Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: In the aftermath of World War VII, isolated pockets of human survivors raided ruined government labs, looking specifically for these weapons. The Spec X program had been accelerated in the late 2120s as the prospect of an all out metahuman vs. machine war became increasingly likely. Prized for their ability to slice through viridian steel exoskeletons, the US was determined to find a substitute for the pure diamond required for the manufacture of the Beta models. Sapphire, while still exorbitantly expensive, allowed the army to produce blades that were 95% as effective as the Betas, at only 20% the cost.

items.name: Personal Rocketship
items.description: It's like a personal pizza but with no pepperoni and it costs five billion dollars.

items.name: Orbital Piano Strike
items.description: Play a piano that summons other flaming pianos to smite your foes! The most ridiculous instrument on ROBLOX has arrived!

items.name: Scroll of Sevenless
items.description: "'That is the weave we must use when fighting Forsaken, Narishma,' al'Thor said, his quiet voice cutting straight through Cadsuane's. 'If we kill them with anything else, they can be reborn. It is a dangerous tool, but still just a tool. Like any other.'"

items.name: Spec Omega Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: Black energy is the heaviest kind of energy.  The sword does some serious damage.

items.name: Icedagger
items.description:
"Is this a dagger which I see before me,
"The handle toward my hand? Come, let me clutch thee. /
I have thee not, and yet I see thee still. /
Art thou not, fatal vision, sensible / 
To feeling as to sight? or art thou but /
A dagger of the mind, a false creation, /
Proceeding from the heat-oppressed brain?"
